# neon_endpoint (Resource)

Manages a Neon endpoint (compute).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "neon_endpoint" "example" {
  project_id             = neon_project.example.id
  branch_id              = neon_branch.example.id
  type                   = "read_write"
  autoscaling_limit_min_cu = 0.25
  autoscaling_limit_max_cu = 1
  suspend_timeout_seconds  = 300
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `branch_id` (String) The branch ID.
- `project_id` (String) The project ID.
- `type` (String) The endpoint type. Must be `read_write` or `read_only`.

### Optional

- `autoscaling_limit_max_cu` (Number) The maximum number of Compute Units.
- `autoscaling_limit_min_cu` (Number) The minimum number of Compute Units.
- `compute_provisioner` (String) The provisioner for the compute endpoint.
- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether the endpoint is disabled.
- `name` (String) Optional name of the compute endpoint.
- `passwordless_access` (Boolean) Whether to permit passwordless access to the compute endpoint.
- `pooler_enabled` (Boolean) Whether connection pooling is enabled.
- `pooler_mode` (String) The connection pooler mode. Must be `transaction`.
- `region_id` (String) The region identifier.
- `settings` (Attributes) Endpoint settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--settings))
- `suspend_timeout_seconds` (Number) The duration of inactivity in seconds after which the compute is suspended.

### Read-Only

- `compute_release_version` (String) Attached compute's release version number.
- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `creation_source` (String) The compute endpoint creation source.
- `current_state` (String) The current state of the compute endpoint.
- `host` (String) The hostname for connecting to the endpoint.
- `id` (String) The endpoint ID.
- `last_active` (String) A timestamp indicating when the compute endpoint was last active.
- `pending_state` (String) The pending state of the compute endpoint.
- `started_at` (String) A timestamp indicating when the compute endpoint was last started.
- `suspended_at` (String) A timestamp indicating when the compute endpoint was last suspended.
- `updated_at` (String) The last update timestamp.

<a id="nestedatt--settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `settings`

Optional:

- `pg_settings` (Map of String) A raw representation of Postgres settings.
- `pgbouncer_settings` (Map of String) A raw representation of PgBouncer settings.
- `preload_libraries` (Attributes) Preload libraries configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--settings--preload_libraries))

<a id="nestedatt--settings--preload_libraries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `settings.preload_libraries`

Optional:

- `enabled_libraries` (List of String) List of enabled preload libraries.
- `use_defaults` (Boolean) Whether to use default preload libraries.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import neon_endpoint.example <project_id>/<endpoint_id>
```
